new_classes.label_en: Other vinegar (not wine vinegar) in containers ≤ 2 L (subheading 2209 00 99)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Essig (kein Weinessig) in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von ≤ 2 L (Unterposition 2209 00 99)
new_classes.definition_en: Fermented vinegar and substitutes for vinegar obtained from acetic acid, other than wine vinegar, presented in containers holding not more than 2 litres; includes products described in the HS Explanatory Notes to heading 2209, Part I, second paragraph, points 2, 3 and 4 and Part II.

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria captured are: (1) the product is a vinegar other than wine vinegar (expressed via subClassOf Vinegar2209 and complement of WineVinegar2209), and (2) the container size is ≤ 2 L (expressed via SmallContainer part restriction and decimalRange on liquidVolumeInLitres). The note also references HS Explanatory Notes to heading 2209, Part I para. 2 points 2–4 and Part II, which describe specific product types (fermented vinegar from sources other than wine, acetic acid substitutes). These product-type distinctions (e.g. cider vinegar, malt vinegar, spirit vinegar, acetic acid substitutes) are not individually modelled as sub-classes due to the lack of existing TBox classes for them and the principle of narrowing over broad axioms. The sibling relationship with OtherVinegarLargeContainer22090091 (containers > 2 L) is adequately captured by the container-size restriction. The complement restriction uses a structurally non-standard pattern (self-referencing); in practice the disjointness from WineVinegar2209 is the key distinguishing axiom and is documented here.
